hero_subtitle: Every cigarette is a step closer to the grave. Stop!
stats_item1: Every 6 seconds someone dies from smoking
stats_item4: 90% of lung cancer cases are due to smoking
myth1_text: There is no safe dose of nicotine. Light cigarettes contain the same poisons.
myth2_text: It's an illusion: nicotine withdrawal causes stress, a cigarette only temporarily relieves it.
myth3_text: Only the first 3 days are tough. Millions have quit – so can you!
tip1: Set a quit date and tell friends
tip3: Drink more water, chew sugarless gum
tip4: Replace the habit with sports or a hobby
tip5: Consult a doctor or use nicotine replacement therapy
harm_title: What smoking does to your body
harm_intro: Smoking destroys you from the inside:
harm_respiratory: Respiratory: chronic bronchitis, emphysema, lung cancer
story1: Anna, 34: 'Smoked for 15 years, quit in a month. Smell returned, started running.'
story2: Max, 28: 'Thought I'd never quit. Lozenges and sports helped. One year smoke-free.'
story3: Elena, 52: '30-year habit. Quit after a heart attack. Life became brighter.'
faq_q1: How long does nicotine withdrawal last?
faq_a1: Acute symptoms pass in 3-7 days. Psychological craving may persist for months but weakens.
faq_a2: No. Vapes contain nicotine and harmful chemicals, just another form of addiction.
faq_a3: Don't blame yourself. Analyze the trigger and keep trying. Every relapse is experience.
error_404_text: You seem lost. Go back home.
error_500_text: Something went wrong. We are fixing it.
